summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: User Manual at /user-manual, Admin Monitoring at /app/admin/monitoring, Subscription Management at /app/subscription, and Analytics Dashboard at /app/analytics. Backend: 35/38 tests passed (92%). Frontend: All new pages load and function correctly with proper UI elements. 3 backend test failures were due to rate limiting during test execution (flaky tests), not actual API issues.

minor.issue: Auth endpoint rate limit (10/min) causes flaky tests when multiple tests call login sequentially

critical_code_review_comments: User Manual API: All 7 endpoints working - /manual, /manual/{section}, /feature/{id}, /search, /quick-start
Admin Monitoring API: All 4 admin endpoints working - /overview, /threat-stats, /app-usage, /performance
Subscription Management API: All endpoints working - /plans, /current, /history, /cancel, /reactivate
User Analytics API: /user-stats returns correct structure with all feature counts
Cashfree Payment: Sandbox order creation working, health check shows configured=true
Protected routes correctly redirect to login for unauthenticated users
Admin routes correctly return 403 for non-admin users

success_rate.backend: 92% (35/38 tests passed - 3 failures due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new feature pages load correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully functional. User Manual accessible from /user-manual and Help link in landing page navigation. Admin Monitoring accessible to admin users at /app/admin/monitoring with 4 tabs (Overview, Security, Usage, Performance). Subscription Management at /app/subscription shows plans and history. Analytics Dashboard at /app/analytics shows feature usage stats. Rate limit of 10/min on auth endpoint may cause flaky tests.

elements_verified: Feature Guides section with expandable items

LANDING_PAGE_HELP_LINK.details: Help link present in desktop navigation bar, links to /user-manual

elements_verified: Current Subscription section (shows No Active Subscription for demo user)
Available Plans: Weekly (₹99), Monthly (₹299 POPULAR), Quarterly (₹699 BEST VALUE)
Feature Usage cards: Story Series, Challenges, Tone Rewrites, Coloring Books, GenStudio Jobs, Total Generations
Quick Actions: View Job History, Buy More Credits, Manage Subscription
Stats cards: Total Users (5), Active Today (0), Revenue This Month (₹0), Job Success Rate (61.9%)

DASHBOARD_NEW_LINKS.details: Dashboard has links to Subscription, Analytics, Help & Guides, Content Vault, Payment History

CASHFREE_SANDBOX.details: Cashfree gateway configured in sandbox mode, order creation working

endpoints_tested: /api/help/manual - 200 OK (returns full manual with overview, features, account, troubleshooting)

ADMIN_ROUTE_PROTECTION.details: Admin endpoints return 403 Forbidden for non-admin users

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully implemented - no mocked endpoints
